name: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap)
description: Free, no-auth geocoding using OpenStreetMap's Nominatim service. Forward + reverse geocoding + place lookup + search. 4 tools.
instructions:
This connector uses Nominatim — OpenStreetMap's free geocoding service (nominatim.org).

**Setup**: NO API KEY REQUIRED. Just install the connector. The base URL is `https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org`.

**HOWEVER — usage policy you MUST respect** (otherwise you'll get banned):
  1. **Max 1 request per second** per IP. The connector does NOT throttle for you — your agent must self-limit. For bulk usage, run a self-hosted Nominatim or use a paid Nominatim host.
  2. **User-Agent header REQUIRED** — every request must identify you. The connector pins `User-Agent: AnythingMCP (https://anythingmcp.com)` automatically.
  3. **No heavy bulk geocoding** — if you need >100 requests/hour, switch to MapTiler / OpenCage / Mapbox / Google.
  4. **Cache results** for at least 24h — avoid re-geocoding the same address.

**Coordinate convention**: latitude FIRST then longitude (unlike Mapbox). Format is `lat,lon` in some endpoints, `lat=X&lon=Y` query params in others.

**Languages**: pass `accept-language` query param (e.g. `de`, `en`, `fr`) to localize place names.

**Result format**: `format=json` (compact), `format=jsonv2` (richer), `format=geojson` (GeoJSON Feature). Default `xml` — always pass `format=json` for our tools.

**Address importance ranking**: results include `importance` (0-1, Wikipedia-derived). High importance = well-known place; low = obscure.

**Out of scope here**: address_lookup batch (use repeated single calls), search by category beyond default, photon (separate but related service).

tools.name: nominatim_search
tools.description: Forward geocode (free-text address → coordinates + structured address). Be polite: max 1 req/sec, cache results, set realistic User-Agent.

format.description: json (compact), jsonv2 (more fields), geojson. Default json.

bounded.description: If 1 with viewbox, restrict to box.

tools.name: nominatim_reverse
tools.description: Reverse geocode (coordinates → address). Returns display_name + address components.

tools.name: nominatim_lookup
tools.description: Look up known OSM IDs (N1234, W5678, R9012 for nodes/ways/relations). Comma-separated up to 50.

osm_ids.description: Comma-separated OSM IDs prefixed with N/W/R, e.g. 'R146656,W104393803,N240109189'.

tools.name: nominatim_status
tools.description: Service status check. Returns 'OK' if Nominatim is up. Useful health check.
